title: chore(deps): update dependency eslint-plugin-jest to v23
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|---|
| [eslint-plugin-jest](https://togithub.com/jest-community/eslint-plugin-jest) | devDependencies | major | [`22.21.0` -> `23.6.0`](https://renovatebot.com/diffs/npm/eslint-plugin-jest/22.21.0/23.6.0) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>jest-community/eslint-plugin-jest</summary>

### [`v23.6.0`](https://togithub.com/jest-community/eslint-plugin-jest/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​2360httpsgithubcomjest-communityeslint-plugin-jestcomparev2350v2360-2020-01-12)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/jest-community/eslint-plugin-jest/compare/v23.5.0...v23.6.0)

##### Features

-   **no-if:** support `switch` statements
    ([#​515](https://togithub.com/jest-community/eslint-plugin-jest/issues/515))
    ([be4e49d](https://togithub.com/jest-community/eslint-plugin-jest/commit/be4e49dcecd64711e743f5e09d1ff24e4c6e1648))

### [`v23.5.0`](https://togithub.com/jest-community/eslint-plugin-jest/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​2360httpsgithubcomjest-communityeslint-plugin-jestcomparev2350v2360-2020-01-12)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/jest-community/eslint-plugin-jest/compare/v23.4.0...v23.5.0)

-   **no-if:** support `switch` statements

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/jest-community/eslint-plugin-jest/compare/v23.3.0...v23.4.0)

##### Features

-   **expect-expect:** support glob patterns for assertFunctionNames
    ([#​509](https://togithub.com/jest-community/eslint-plugin-jest/issues/509))
    ([295ca9a](https://togithub.com/jest-community/eslint-plugin-jest/commit/295ca9a6969c77fadaa1a42d76e89cae992520a6))
-   **valid-expect:** refactor `valid-expect` linting messages
    ([#​501](https://togithub.com/jest-community/eslint-plugin-jest/issues/501))
    ([7338362](https://togithub.com/jest-community/eslint-plugin-jest/commit/7338362420eb4970f99be2016bb4ded5732797e3))

### [`v23.3.0`](https://togithub.com/jest-community/eslint-plugin-jest/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​2340httpsgithubcomjest-communityeslint-plugin-jestcomparev2330v2340-2020-01-10)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/jest-community/eslint-plugin-jest/compare/v23.2.0...v23.3.0)

##### Features

-   **expect-expect:** support chained function names
    ([#​471](https://togithub.com/jest-community/eslint-plugin-jest/issues/471))
    ([#​508](https://togithub.com/jest-community/eslint-plugin-jest/issues/508))
    ([beb1aec](https://togithub.com/jest-community/eslint-plugin-jest/commit/beb1aececee80589c182e95bc64ef01d97eb5e78))
-   **rules:** add support for function declaration as test case
    ([#​504](https://togithub.com/jest-community/eslint-plugin-jest/issues/504))
    ([ac7fa48](https://togithub.com/jest-community/eslint-plugin-jest/commit/ac7fa487d05705bee1b2d5264d5096f0232ae1e1))

### [`v23.2.0`](https://togithub.com/jest-community/eslint-plugin-jest/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​2330httpsgithubcomjest-communityeslint-plugin-jestcomparev2320v2330-2020-01-04)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/jest-community/eslint-plugin-jest/compare/v23.1.1...v23.2.0)
